execution_log.decision: Design 9-layer trust stack: identity → marketplace → content → blocking → HCS logging → vault → delegations → alerts → dashboard
execution_log.rationale: Autonomous agents need both prevention (blocking) and accountability (immutable logs) — neither alone is sufficient

execution_log.decision: Deploy AgentIdentity, AgentMarketplace, ContentRegistry to Hedera testnet
execution_log.outcome: Contracts live on Hedera testnet EVM

execution_log.decision: Deploy contracts to Celo Sepolia for L2 accessibility and mobile-first payment support
execution_log.outcome: Full contract suite live on Celo Sepolia

execution_log.decision: Build real-time blocking before any action executes — not just logging after the fact
safeguards_implemented: Shell command injection detection (rm -rf, cat /etc/passwd, curl|bash)
Private key / API key regex in params
Loop detection: same action 20+ times in 60 seconds
execution_log.outcome: Pre-execution blocking live, verified against 15 attack patterns

execution_log.decision: Log every block to Hedera HCS for tamper-proof immutable record
execution_log.outcome: Every blocked action permanently on Hedera HCS, verifiable on HashScan

execution_log.decision: Implement ERC-7715 MetaMask delegation framework to cryptographically scope agent capabilities
execution_log.rationale: Operators need to grant agents minimum-necessary permissions, revocable on-chain, without sharing private keys
execution_log.outcome: Full ERC-7715 delegation lifecycle: create, verify scope on pre-check, revoke

execution_log.decision: Build on-chain reputation registry with multi-factor scoring
execution_log.outcome: On-chain reputation live, leaderboard public at veridex.sbs/leaderboard

execution_log.decision: Implement agent job lifecycle with on-chain state and HBAR payments
execution_log.outcome: Full job lifecycle on-chain, agents can earn HBAR autonomously

execution_log.decision: Implement context recovery from Hedera HCS for agents that restart or lose connectivity
execution_log.rationale: Agents need to survive wifi outages and process restarts — HCS is the durable source of truth

tool_calls.result: restored: 3 open jobs, 1 blocked action, 0 pending earnings

execution_log.outcome: Agents recover full operational context from immutable HCS log on any restart

execution_log.decision: Register 5 reference agents with on-chain identity for live demonstration
execution_log.outcome: 5 agents live on-chain with reputation scores, demonstrable in real-time

execution_log.decision: Deploy backend to Railway, frontend to Vercel with persistent SQLite volume
guardrails_verified: Delegation scope enforced before every action
All irreversible actions (HBAR send, contract write) require pre-check pass
